<img src="/content/dam/fortinet/images/icons/ngfw/icon-download.svg" alt="download"/>
</a>
</td>
<td>
<a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=V7R3mwXnnaE" data-video="youtube" data-video-id="V7R3mwXnnaE">

<tr>
<td>
<a target="_blank" href="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/data-sheets/pdf/fortigate-3800g-series.pdf" class="trailing-link">FortiGate 3800G</a>
</td>

</div>
</div>

<style>
.category-button {
border: none;
background-color: transparent;
padding: 0px;
margin-bottom: 46px;
}

.model-dropdown {
display: none;
}

td {
padding: 20px 18px !important;
}

#model-data-center {
padding-top: 5px;
}

th {
padding: 5px 18px 11px !important;
font-size: 13px !important;
}

.model {
padding: 20px 46px 16px 0px;
}

#model-fgaas,
#model-branch,
#model-campus {
opacity: 0.33;
}

.category-button:hover>.model-title {
color: #242424;
}

.category-button:hover .model{
opacity: 1 !important;
transition: all 0.5s !important;
cursor: pointer;
}

.flex-container {
display: flex;
}

.flex-child {
width: 20%;
}

.flex-list {
width: 80%;
}

.flex-child:first-child {
margin-right: 46px;
width: 20%;
border-right: 2px solid #CECECE;
}

tr {
border-bottom: 2px solid #CECECE;
}

tr:last-child,tr:first-child {
border-bottom: none;
}

td:first-child {
width: 40%;
}

th:not(:first-child),
td:not(:first-child) {
text-align: center;
}

.model-title {
padding-right: 46px;
text-align: center;
font-weight: 700;
color: #606060;
}

.active {
color: #242424;
}

.table-closed {
display: none;
}

#table-branch,
#table-campus,
#table-data-center,
#table-fgaas {
margin-top: 0px;
}

#table-branch a,
#table-campus a,
#table-data-center a,
#table-fgaas a {
color: #333333;
border-bottom: none;
font-weight: 500;
}

#table-branch a:hover,
#table-campus a:hover,
#table-data-center a:hover,
#table-fgaas a:hover {
background: none;
}

@media only screen and (min-width: 800px) and (max-width: 1200px) {

.model-title,
.model {
padding-right: 24px;
}
}

@media only screen and (max-width: 800px) {

.option {
padding: 6px 20px;
}

.option:hover {
cursor: pointer;
background: #E6E6E6;
}

.dropdowns {
width: 75%;
position: relative;
}

.category-title {
margin-right: 27px;
font-weight: 700;
font-size: 14px;
line-height: 17px;
width: 25%;
}

.flex-category {
display: none;
}

.flex-list {
width: 100%;
overflow-x: auto;
}

.dropbtn {
background-color: #FFFFFF;
width: 100%;
border: 1px solid #C4C5C7;
border-radius: 4px;
color: #242424;
padding: 16px;
font-weight: 400;
font-size: 16px;
cursor: pointer;
text-align: left;
}

.model-dropdown {
display: block;
margin-bottom: 40px;
}

.dropdown-content {
position: absolute;
background-color: #FFFFFF;
width: 100%;
box-shadow: 0px 4px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
z-index: 1;
border: 1px solid #C4C5C7;
padding: 8px 0px;
}

.dropdown-content a {
color: black;
padding: 12px 16px;
text-decoration: none;
display: block;
}

.dropdown-content a:hover {
background-color: #E6E6E6
}

.caret {
width: 0;
height: 0;
display: inline-block;
border: 7px solid transparent;
position: absolute;
left: 89.28%;
right: 8.04%;
top: 43.2%;
bottom: 56.41%;
}

.caret.down {
border-top-color: #454545;
}

.categories {
display: flex;
position: relative;
align-items: center;
flex-direction: row;
}
}

.hidden {
display: none;
}
.flex-child td:last-child img {
height: 26px;
width:26px;
}
.flex-child td img {
height: 28px;
width: 18px;
}
</style>

<script>
var modelBranch = document.getElementById("model-branch");
var modelCampus = document.getElementById("model-campus");
var modelDataCenter = document.getElementById("model-data-center");
var modelFGaaS = document.getElementById("model-fgaas");
var tableBranch = document.getElementById("table-branch");
var tableCampus = document.getElementById("table-campus");
var tableDataCenter = document.getElementById("table-data-center");
var tableFGaaS = document.getElementById("table-fgaas");
var branchButton = document.getElementById("branch-button");
var campusButton = document.getElementById("campus-button");
var dataCenterButton = document.getElementById("dataCenter-button");
var FGaaSButton = document.getElementById("fgaas-button");

branchButton.addEventListener("click", function() {
branch();
})
campusButton.addEventListener("click", function() {
campus();
})
dataCenterButton.addEventListener("click", function() {
dataCenter();
})
FGaaSButton.addEventListener("click", function() {
FGaaS();
})

branchButton.addEventListener("keydown", function() {
if (event.keyCode === 13){
branch();
}
})
campusButton.addEventListener("keydown", function() {
if (event.keyCode === 13){
campus();
}
})
dataCenterButton.addEventListener("keydown", function() {
if (event.keyCode === 13){
dataCenter();
}
})
FGaaSButton.addEventListener("keydown", function() {
if (event.keyCode === 13){
FGaaS();
}
})

function branch() {
modelCampus.style.opacity = "0.33";
modelDataCenter.style.opacity = "0.33";
modelFGaaS.style.opacity = "0.33";
modelBranch.style.opacity = "1";
modelBranch.nextElementSibling.classList.add("active");
modelCampus.nextElementSibling.classList.remove("active");
modelDataCenter.nextElementSibling.classList.remove("active");
modelFGaaS.nextElementSibling.classList.remove("active");
tableBranch.classList.remove("table-closed");
tableCampus.classList.add("table-closed");
tableDataCenter.classList.add("table-closed");
tableFGaaS.classList.add("table-closed");
}

function campus() {
modelBranch.style.opacity = "0.33";
modelDataCenter.style.opacity = "0.33";
modelFGaaS.style.opacity = "0.33";
modelCampus.style.opacity = "1";
modelCampus.nextElementSibling.classList.add("active");
modelBranch.nextElementSibling.classList.remove("active");
modelDataCenter.nextElementSibling.classList.remove("active");
modelFGaaS.nextElementSibling.classList.remove("active");
tableCampus.classList.remove("table-closed");
tableBranch.classList.add("table-closed");
tableDataCenter.classList.add("table-closed");
tableFGaaS.classList.add("table-closed");
}

function dataCenter() {
modelCampus.style.opacity = "0.33";
modelBranch.style.opacity = "0.33";
modelFGaaS.style.opacity = "0.33";
modelDataCenter.style.opacity = "1";
modelDataCenter.nextElementSibling.classList.add("active");
modelCampus.nextElementSibling.classList.remove("active");
modelBranch.nextElementSibling.classList.remove("active");
modelFGaaS.nextElementSibling.classList.remove("active");
tableDataCenter.classList.remove("table-closed");
tableCampus.classList.add("table-closed");
tableBranch.classList.add("table-closed");
tableFGaaS.classList.add("table-closed");
}
function FGaaS() {
modelCampus.style.opacity = "0.33";
modelBranch.style.opacity = "0.33";
modelDataCenter.style.opacity = "0.33";
modelFGaaS.style.opacity = "1";
modelFGaaS.nextElementSibling.classList.add("active");
modelCampus.nextElementSibling.classList.remove("active");
modelBranch.nextElementSibling.classList.remove("active");
modelDataCenter.nextElementSibling.classList.remove("active");
tableFGaaS.classList.remove("table-closed");
tableCampus.classList.add("table-closed");
tableBranch.classList.add("table-closed");
tableDataCenter.classList.add("table-closed");
}
const content = document.getElementById('dropdown-content');
const btn = document.getElementById('dropbtn');
btn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
content.classList.toggle('hidden');
});
content.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
btn.innerText = e.target.innerText;
var caret = document.createElement("SPAN");
caret.classList.add('caret', 'down')
btn.appendChild(caret);
content.classList.toggle('hidden');
if (e.target.classList.value=="1") {
dataCenter();
btn.setAttribute("value","high-end");
} else if (e.target.classList.value=="2") {
campus();
btn.setAttribute("value","mid-range");
} else if(e.target.classList.value=="3"){
branch();
btn.setAttribute("value","entry-level");
} else {
FGaaS();
btn.setAttribute("value","fgaas");
}
})
</script>

</div>




</div>
</section>
</div>


<div class="C960-Product-UseCases"><style>

.C960-Product-UseCases .wrap--default{
padding-top:50px;
}
.C960-Product-UseCases{
background: #FBFBFB;
}
.C960-Product-UseCases h2.new--design:after{
margin-bottom:30px!important;
}
.use-case-container {
display: flex;
flex-wrap: wrap;
margin-top: 30px;
padding:0px!important;
}

.uc-cell-info{
width: 80%;
padding-left: 20px;
}

.uc-title{
font-size: 16px;
font-weight: 600;
line-height: 22px;
text-transform: uppercase;
}

.uc-desc{
display: -webkit-inline-box;
text-overflow: ellipsis;
/* -webkit-line-clamp: 4; */
-webkit-box-orient: vertical;
overflow: hidden;
font-weight: 400;
font-size: 15px;
line-height: 20px;
color: #323E48;
padding-top: 4px;
}

.uc-cell-info a{
font-weight: 700;
font-size: 15px;
line-height: 20px;
color: #323E48;
border-bottom: 1px dotted #b3b3b3;
}
.uc-cell-info a:hover{
color: #da291c;
transition: color 0.4s ease;
cursor:pointer;
text-decoration:none;
}
.uc-img{
height: 50px;
}

.uc-cell{
display: flex;
align-items: flex-start;
flex-direction: row;
margin-bottom: 79px;
padding-right: 65px;
width: 20px;
text-align: left;
line-height: 15px;
font-size: 10px;
flex: 0 0 33.333333%;

}

@media (max-width: 900px) {

.use-case-container {
justify-content: center;
}

.uc-cell{
flex: 0 0 50%;
padding-right: 0px;
margin-bottom: 40px;
}
}

@media (max-width: 500px) {
.use-case-container.container{
padding-left: 0px;
padding-right: 0px;
}
.use-case-container {
flex-direction: column;
}
.uc-cell{
width: 100%;
margin-bottom: 24px;
}
}
</style>



<div class="bg--gray2">
<div class="wrap wrap--default ">
<div class="C15-Title">
<h2 class="new--design">

</h2>
</div>
<div class="use-case-container container">
<div class="uc-cell">
<img class="uc-img lozad" alt="icon secure sd wan" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/images/icons/benefits/icon-secure-sd-wan.svg" src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII="/>
<div class="uc-cell-info">
<a target="_self" href="/jp/products/sd-wan"><span class="uc-title">セキュアSD-WAN</span></a>
<div class="uc-desc">セキュアなWANインフラストラクチャを導入することで、ユーザーエクスペリエンスの向上、運用の簡素化、TCOの削減を実現</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="uc-cell">
<img class="uc-img lozad" alt="icon protect remote branch" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/images/icons/benefits/icon-protect-remote-branch.svg" src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII="/>
<div class="uc-cell-info">

</div>
</div>

<div class="uc-cell">
<img class="uc-img lozad" alt="icon single pane" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/images/icons/benefits/icon-single-pane.svg" src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII="/>
<div class="uc-cell-info">

</div>
</div>

<div class="uc-cell">
<img class="uc-img lozad" alt="icon benefits ztna" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/images/icons/benefits/icon-benefits-ztna.svg" src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII="/>
<div class="uc-cell-info">

</div>
</div>

<div class="uc-cell">
<img class="uc-img lozad" alt="icon fortiguard" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/images/icons/fg-services/icon-fortiguard.svg" src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII="/>
<div class="uc-cell-info">

</div>
</div>

<div class="uc-cell">

<div class="C919-Partners-List">

<a target="_blank" href="https://www.servicenow.com/" class="partner-title">
ServiceNow
</a>
<div class="partner-item-content-wrapper">

<p>ServiceNowは仕事をより良いものにします。ServiceNowのアプリケーションは、IT、カスタマー・サービス、セキュリティ・オペレーション、HRなどのビジネスプロセスを自動化、予測、デジタル化、最適化し、より良い企業体験を提供します。</p>
<ul class="partners-assets">
<li><a href="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/alliances/sb-Fortinet-ServiceNow.pdf" target="_blank">Solution brief</a></li>
<li><a href="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/alliances/FortiManager-5-6-3-security-operations-app.pdf" target="_blank">FortiManager Technical Integration Guide</a></li>
<li><a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-_920JSarrI" target="_blank"> Integration Video</a></li>
</ul>

<img class="lozad" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/images/icons/alliances/logos/logo-crowdstrike.png" src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" alt="CrowdStrike, Inc." data-logo-size="p-s-logo"/>

<a target="_blank" href="https://www.crowdstrike.com" class="partner-title">
CrowdStrike, Inc.
</a>
<div class="partner-item-content-wrapper">

<p>CrowdStrikeは、エンドポイントやクラウドワークロード、アイデンティティ、データなど、企業リスクの重要な領域を保護する世界最先端のクラウドネイティブプラットフォームにより、セキュリティを再定義しています。</p>

Claroty

<div class="partner-item-content-wrapper">

<p>ClarotyのICSセキュリティプラットフォームは、産業用ネットワークと資産をサイバー攻撃から受動的に保護し、人員や高価な産業用資産の安全性とセキュリティを損なうことなく、世界で最も重要なインフラストラクチャの安全で継続した運用を保証します。また、同社は、2018 S4 ICSチャレンジを受賞しています。</p>

<!--content-->
<div class="partner-item-content">
<a target="_blank" href="http://www.intel.com/" class="partner-title">
Intel
</a>
<div class="partner-item-content-wrapper">

<p>Intelはテクノロジーの境界で発明し、ビジネスや社会、そして地球上のすべての人に素晴らしいエクスペリエンスを可能にします。</p>
<ul class="partners-assets">
<li><a href="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/alliances/2019/sb-fortinet-alliances-intel.pdf" target="_blank">Solution brief</a></li>
<li><a href="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/alliances/sb-fa-intel-security-device-onboard.pdf" target="_blank">FortiNAC-Intel SDO Solution Brief</a></li>
</ul>

<div class="row">
<div class="col-12 col-sm-12">


<div class="partners-options">
<div class="option-heading">Resources</div>
<div class="option-content p-assets">

</div>
</div>
<div class="partners-options">
<div class="option-heading">Functionalities</div>
<div class="option-content">
SDN-NFV &amp; Virtualization
</div>
</div>
<div class="alliance-partners-listing-icons">
<img src="/content/dam/fortinet/images/icons/alliances/fortinet-fabric-ready-partner.jpg" height="50" alt="Fortinet Fabric Ready"/>
<img src="/content/dam/fortinet/images/icons/alliances/Fabric-AI-Icon.png" height="50" alt=""/>
</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="functions" data-functions="SDN-NFV &amp; Virtualization"></div>
<div class="types" data-types="APIs,Fabric-Ready Partner"></div>
<div class="producttags"></div>
</div>
</div>
<!--end content-->
</div>
<div class="featured--customer homepage-col-5 partner-item" data-partner="Dragos">
<img class="lozad" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/images/icons/alliances/logos/logo-dragos.png" src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" alt="Dragos" data-logo-size="p-s-logo"/>
<!--content-->
<div class="partner-item-content">
<a target="_blank" href="https://www.dragos.com/" class="partner-title">
Dragos
</a>
<div class="partner-item-content-wrapper">

<p>Dragosのミッションは、産業インフラを標的とする攻撃者から文明を守ることです。Dragosはフォーティネットと協力し、サイバーイベントの可視化と相関性の向上を実現します。これにより、お客様はイベントと必要なアクションを分類する際に、より良い情報に基づいた評価と意思決定を行うことができます。</p>
<ul class="partners-assets">
<li><a href="/corporate/about-us/newsroom/press-releases/2021/fortinet-dragos-expand-partnership-further-secure-ot-infrastructure" target="_blank">Press Release</a></li>
<li><a href="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/solution-guides/sb-fortisiem-and-dragos-platform-delivers-security-visibility.pdf" target="_blank">Solution Brief</a></li>
<li><a href="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/solution-guides/sb-dragos-integrated-technology.pdf" target="_blank">Integrated Technology from DRAGOS and Fortinet Solution Brief</a></li>
</ul>

<div class="row">
<div class="col-12 col-sm-12">


<div class="partners-options">
<div class="option-heading">Resources</div>
<div class="option-content p-assets">

</div>
</div>
<div class="partners-options">
<div class="option-heading">Functionalities</div>
<div class="option-content">
Operational Technology, Threat Intelligence
</div>
</div>
<div class="alliance-partners-listing-icons">
<img src="/content/dam/fortinet/images/icons/alliances/fortinet-fabric-ready-partner.jpg" height="50" alt="Fortinet Fabric Ready"/>
<img src="/content/dam/fortinet/images/icons/alliances/Fabric-AI-Icon.png" height="50" alt=""/>
</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="functions" data-functions="Operational Technology,Threat Intelligence"></div>
<div class="types" data-types="APIs,Fabric-Ready Partner"></div>
<div class="producttags"></div>
</div>
</div>
<!--end content-->
</div>
<div class="featured--customer homepage-col-5 partner-item" data-partner="Tufin">
<img class="lozad" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/images/icons/alliances/logos/logo-tufin.jpg" src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" alt="Tufin" data-logo-size="p-s-logo"/>
<!--content-->
<div class="partner-item-content">
<a target="_blank" href="http://www.tufin.com/" class="partner-title">
Tufin
</a>
<div class="partner-item-content-wrapper">

<p>TufinはSecurity Policy Orchestration市場をリードし、企業がハイブリッドクラウドと物理ネットワーク環境においてセキュリティポリシーを一元的に管理、可視化、制御することを可能にします。</p>
<ul class="partners-assets">

</li>
<li><a href="https://www.brighttalk.com/webcast/9591/180115">Solution Overview Video</a></li>
</ul>

<a class="resources-card" target="_blank" href="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/ebook/eb-five-advantages-secure-ai-data-center.pdf">
<div class="resources-card-body">

<img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/ebook/eb-five-advantages-secure-ai-data-center.pdf.thumb.319.319.png" alt="Top 5 Advantages of the Fortinet Secure AI Data Center Solution" class="resources-image lozad"/>

<div class="resources-title">
<span>
Top 5 Advantages of the Fortinet Secure AI Data Center Solution »
</span>
</div>
<p class="resources-desc">
The Fortinet Secure AI Data Center solution includes a rich portfolio of FortiGate NGFWs with integrated FortiAI-enriched protection, management, and analytics in a single platform.
</p>
</div>
</a>





<a class="resources-card" target="_blank" href="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/ebook/ja_jp/eb-protecting-every-edge.pdf">
<div class="resources-card-body">

<img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/ebook/ja_jp/eb-protecting-every-edge.pdf.thumb.319.319.png" alt="あらゆるエッジの保護による不正侵入の防止" class="resources-image lozad"/>

<div class="resources-title">
<span>
あらゆるエッジの保護による不正侵入の防止 »
</span>
</div>
<p class="resources-desc">
</p>
</div>
</a>





<a class="resources-card" target="_blank" href="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/ebook/eb-fortigate-customer-success.pdf">
<div class="resources-card-body">

<img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/ebook/eb-fortigate-customer-success.pdf.thumb.319.319.png" alt="Winning with AI-Powered Network Firewalls – Real Customer Success Stories" class="resources-image lozad"/>

<div class="resources-title">
<span>
Winning with AI-Powered Network Firewalls – Real Customer Success Stories »
</span>
</div>
<p class="resources-desc">
This collection of success stories illustrates how companies across various industries have leveraged the latest security and AI/ML technologies to achieve remarkable outcomes in cybersecurity, operational efficiency, and business resilience.
</p>
</div>
</a>



</div>
</div>


</div>
<div class="id-tab-container c968-resources-tab-container" data-tab data-tabId="c968_resources_tiles-2">

<div class="resources-list">

<a class="resources-card" target="_self" href="/jp/resources/analyst-reports/gartner-magic-quadrant-hmf">
<div class="resources-card-body">

<img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/images/diagrams/diagram-analyst-report-gartner-mq-hmf.jpg" alt="2025 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Hybrid Mesh Firewall" class="resources-image lozad"/>

<div class="resources-title">
<span>
2025 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Hybrid Mesh Firewall »
</span>
</div>
<p class="resources-desc">
Fortinet has been named a Leader in the 2025 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Hybrid Mesh Firewall. We believe this reflects what security teams value most: performance, simplicity, and control.
</p>
</div>
</a>



</div>
</div>


</div>
<div class="id-tab-container c968-resources-tab-container" data-tab data-tabId="c968_resources_tiles-3">

<a class="resources-card" target="_blank" href="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/checklists/ja_jp/cl-top-6-recommendations-for-improving-user-productivity.pdf">
<div class="resources-card-body">

<img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/checklists/ja_jp/cl-top-6-recommendations-for-improving-user-productivity.pdf.thumb.319.319.png" alt="ハイブリッドアーキテクチャによるユーザーの生産性向上を可能にする6つの提案" class="resources-image lozad"/>

<div class="resources-title">

</span>
</div>
<p class="resources-desc">
</p>
</div>
</a>





<a class="resources-card" target="_blank" href="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/checklists/ch-building-hmf.pdf">
<div class="resources-card-body">

<img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/checklists/ch-building-hmf.pdf.thumb.319.319.png" alt="10 Considerations for Building a Hybrid Mesh Firewall" class="resources-image lozad"/>

<div class="resources-title">
<span>
10 Considerations for Building a Hybrid Mesh Firewall »
</span>
</div>
<p class="resources-desc">
This unified security platform provides coordinated protection to multiple areas of enterprise IT, including corporate sites, such as branches, campuses, data centers, public and private clouds, and remote workers. This, then, can form the core of a broader security framework.
</p>
</div>
</a>

<div class="id-tab-container c968-resources-tab-container" data-tab data-tabId="c968_resources_tiles-5">

<div class="resources-list">
<div class="resources-row">


<a class="resources-card" target="_blank" href="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/industry-briefs/ii-hybrid-mesh-firewall.pdf">
<div class="resources-card-body">

<img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/industry-briefs/ii-hybrid-mesh-firewall.pdf.thumb.319.319.png" alt="Integrated Network Firewalls: An Essential Solution for Today’s Distributed Enterprise" class="resources-image lozad"/>

<div class="resources-title">
<span>
Integrated Network Firewalls: An Essential Solution for Today’s Distributed Enterprise »
</span>
</div>
<p class="resources-desc">
Integrated network firewalls bring enormous benefits to enterprise IT. These include increased IT operational efficiency, simplified cybersecurity operations, reduced organizational risk, relief from the cybersecurity skills gap, resilient protection against known and unknown cyberthreats, automation and coordination via AI/ML, and a lower total cost of ownership.
</p>
</div>
</a>





<a class="resources-card" target="_blank" href="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/industry-briefs/ii-fortigate-7000f.pdf">
<div class="resources-card-body">

<img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/industry-briefs/ii-fortigate-7000f.pdf.thumb.319.319.png" alt="Boost Your Data Center’s Performance and Security with the FortiGate 7000F Series" class="resources-image lozad"/>

<div class="resources-title">
<span>
Boost Your Data Center’s Performance and Security with the FortiGate 7000F Series »
</span>
</div>
<p class="resources-desc">
The FortiGate 7000F series delivers unparalleled value as an all-in-one cybersecurity solution that integrates high-performance networking and security.
</p>
</div>
</a>



</div>
</div>


</div>
<div class="id-tab-container c968-resources-tab-container" data-tab data-tabId="c968_resources_tiles-6">

<div class="resources-list">
<div class="resources-row">


<a class="resources-card" target="_blank" href="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/infographics/infographic-ngfw.pdf">
<div class="resources-card-body">

<img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/infographics/infographic-ngfw.pdf.thumb.319.319.png" alt="Fortinet Secure AI Data Center Solution Infographic" class="resources-image lozad"/>

<div class="resources-title">
<span>
Fortinet Secure AI Data Center Solution Infographic »
</span>
</div>
<p class="resources-desc">
The Fortinet Secure AI Data Center solution enforces zero trust, inspects encrypted traffic, prevents data loss, and handles high-volume AI workloads without latency or bottlenecks.
</p>
</div>
</a>



</div>
</div>


</div>
<div class="id-tab-container c968-resources-tab-container" data-tab data-tabId="c968_resources_tiles-7">

<div class="resources-list">
<div class="resources-row">


<a class="resources-card" target="_blank" href="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/white-papers/pov-hybrid-and-hyperscale-data-centers.pdf">
<div class="resources-card-body">

<img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/white-papers/pov-hybrid-and-hyperscale-data-centers.pdf.thumb.319.319.png" alt="Protecting Hybrid and Hyperscale Data Centers" class="resources-image lozad"/>

<div class="resources-title">
<span>
Protecting Hybrid and Hyperscale Data Centers »
</span>
</div>
<p class="resources-desc">
With the right solutions, effective and efficient security for hybrid and hyperscale data centers is well within reach.
</p>
</div>
</a>





<a class="resources-card" target="_blank" href="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/white-papers/pov-data-center-evolution.pdf">
<div class="resources-card-body">

<img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/white-papers/pov-data-center-evolution.pdf.thumb.319.319.png" alt="Hybrid Network Architectures Require Innovative Security Solutions" class="resources-image lozad"/>

<div class="resources-title">
<span>
Hybrid Network Architectures Require Innovative Security Solutions »
</span>
</div>
<p class="resources-desc">
The key challenge lies in deploying solutions that scale and adapt to the evolving hybrid landscape, securing critical applications and high-throughput traffic across diverse network environments.
</p>
</div>
</a>



</div>
</div>


</div>
<div class="id-tab-container c968-resources-tab-container" data-tab data-tabId="c968_resources_tiles-8">

<div class="resources-list">
<div class="resources-row">


<a class="resources-card" target="_blank" href="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/solution-guides/sb-fortigate-visibility.pdf">
<div class="resources-card-body">

<img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/solution-guides/sb-fortigate-visibility.pdf.thumb.319.319.png" alt="Enable Deep Visibility for Applications, Users, and Devices with FortiGate Next-Generation Firewalls" class="resources-image lozad"/>

<div class="resources-title">
<span>
Enable Deep Visibility for Applications, Users, and Devices with FortiGate Next-Generation Firewalls »
</span>
</div>
<p class="resources-desc">
FortiGate NGFWs deliver the visibility into encrypted traffic and user, application, and device activity necessary to build contextual, evolving network and security policies that secure digital transformation.
</p>
</div>
</a>





<a class="resources-card" target="_blank" href="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/solution-guides/SB-Enterprise-Firewall.pdf">
<div class="resources-card-body">

<img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/solution-guides/SB-Enterprise-Firewall.pdf.thumb.319.319.png" alt="Protect Your Hybrid Network’s Expanding Attack Surfaces with FortiGate Next-Generation Firewalls" class="resources-image lozad"/>

<div class="resources-title">
<span>
Protect Your Hybrid Network’s Expanding Attack Surfaces with FortiGate Next-Generation Firewalls »
</span>
</div>
<p class="resources-desc">
FortiGate Next-Generation Firewalls (NGFWs) offer a game-changing solution to stop today’s sophisticated, evasive threats and zero-day attacks.
</p>
</div>
</a>





<a class="resources-card" target="_blank" href="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/solution-guides/sb-high-security-ai.pdf">
<div class="resources-card-body">

<img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/solution-guides/sb-high-security-ai.pdf.thumb.319.319.png" alt="Fortinet High-Performance Security for AI-Driven Data Centers" class="resources-image lozad"/>

<div class="resources-title">
<span>
Fortinet High-Performance Security for AI-Driven Data Centers »
</span>
</div>
<p class="resources-desc">
Fortinet’s AI Data Center Firewall Solution addresses threats targeting AI and LLM systems with ASIC accelerated inspection, LLM-aware threat protection, and unified governance across every layer of the AI stack.
</p>
</div>
</a>





<a class="resources-card" target="_blank" href="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/solution-guides/ja_jp/br_jp_solution_guide.pdf">
<div class="resources-card-body">

<img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/solution-guides/ja_jp/br_jp_solution_guide.pdf.thumb.319.319.png" alt="フォーティネット ソリューションガイド 2025" class="resources-image lozad"/>

<span>
フォーティネット ソリューションガイド 2025 »
</span>
</div>
<p class="resources-desc">
セキュリティファブリックソリューション、製品を解説
</p>
</div>
</a>





<a class="resources-card" target="_blank" href="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/solution-guides/ja_jp/hybrid-mesh-firewall-an-essential-solution-for-today-s-distributed-enterprise.pdf">
<div class="resources-card-body">

<img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/solution-guides/ja_jp/hybrid-mesh-firewall-an-essential-solution-for-today-s-distributed-enterprise.pdf.thumb.319.319.png" alt="ハイブリッドメッシュファイアウォール：今日の分散型企業に不可欠なソリューション" class="resources-image lozad"/>

ハイブリッドメッシュファイアウォール：今日の分散型企業に不可欠なソリューション »
</span>
</div>
<p class="resources-desc">
</p>
</div>
</a>





<a class="resources-card" target="_blank" href="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/solution-guides/ja_jp/sb-protecting-hyperscale-data-centers-from-ransomware.pdf">
<div class="resources-card-body">

<img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/solution-guides/ja_jp/sb-protecting-hyperscale-data-centers-from-ransomware.pdf.thumb.319.319.png" alt="ランサムウェア攻撃やボリューム型DDoS攻撃からハイパースケールデータセンターを保護" class="resources-image lozad"/>

<div class="resources-title">
<span>
ランサムウェア攻撃やボリューム型DDoS攻撃からハイパースケールデータセンターを保護 »
</span>
</div>
<p class="resources-desc">
フォーティネットの先進的なイノベーションが昨今のハイブリッド環境を大規模に保護
</p>
</div>
</a>





<a class="resources-card" target="_blank" href="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/solution-guides/sb-critical-security-campus.pdf">
<div class="resources-card-body">

<img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/solution-guides/sb-critical-security-campus.pdf.thumb.319.319.png" alt="Critical Security Controls to Enhance Your Campus FortiGate" class="resources-image lozad"/>

<div class="resources-title">
<span>
Critical Security Controls to Enhance Your Campus FortiGate »
</span>
</div>
<p class="resources-desc">
FortiGate Next-Generation Firewalls (NGFWs), as part of a hybrid mesh firewall architecture, protect dynamic campus networks using powerful AI-powered security services that provide deep visibility into all users, devices, and applications.
</p>
</div>
</a>





<a class="resources-card" target="_blank" href="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/solution-guides/sb-automate-network-management-for-the-fortinet-security-fabric.pdf">
<div class="resources-card-body">

<img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/solution-guides/sb-automate-network-management-for-the-fortinet-security-fabric.pdf.thumb.319.319.png" alt="Supercharge Your Network: Unleash Network Management Automation" class="resources-image lozad"/>

<div class="resources-title">
<span>
Supercharge Your Network: Unleash Network Management Automation »
</span>
</div>
<p class="resources-desc">
The rapid adoption of digital transformation pushes business networks to adopt a hybrid strategy. As a result, the network infrastructure is getting more distributed, making it hard to manage and secure. And not surprisingly, among all causes leading to cyber incidents and network downtime, human error and misconfigurations are at the top.
</p>
</div>
</a>
















</div>
</div>


</div>
<div class="id-tab-container c968-resources-tab-container" data-tab data-tabId="c968_resources_tiles-9">

<div class="resources-list">
<div class="resources-row">


<a class="resources-card" target="_blank" href="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/toolkit/hybrid-mesh-firewall-solution-toolkit.pdf">
<div class="resources-card-body">

<img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/toolkit/hybrid-mesh-firewall-solution-toolkit.pdf.thumb.319.319.png" alt="Data Center Firewall Toolkit" class="resources-image lozad"/>

<div class="resources-title">
<span>
Data Center Firewall Toolkit »
</span>
</div>
<p class="resources-desc">
The Fortinet Data Center Firewall Toolkit provides practical advice, guidance, and insights into the advantages of choosing Fortinet to unify all firewall deployments across your distributed hybrid environments.
</p>
</div>
</a>



</div>
</div>


</div>
<div class="id-tab-container c968-resources-tab-container" data-tab data-tabId="c968_resources_tiles-10">

<div class="resources-list">
<div class="resources-row">


<a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ne56Vh3NsdU" class="resources-card" data-video="youtube" data-video-id="ne56Vh3NsdU">
<div class="resources-card-body">

<img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/images/videos/video-soucy-enterprises-fortinet-secure-sd-branch.png" alt="The Voice of the Customer: Soucy Enterprises with Fortinet Secure SD-Branch" class="resources-image lozad"/>

<div class="resources-title">
<span>
The Voice of the Customer: Soucy Enterprises with Fortinet Secure SD-Branch »
</span>
</div>
<p class="resources-desc">
Jean François Nadeau, CISO at Soucy Enterprises - one of the largest manufacturers in Quebec, Canada - shares his experience with Fortinet Secure SD-Branch, highlighting the benefits of unifying communications across their various companies.
</p>
</div>
</a>





<a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9cm-kP9tFGI" class="resources-card" data-video="youtube" data-video-id="9cm-kP9tFGI">
<div class="resources-card-body">

<img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/images/videos/video-hornsby-shire-council-case-study.png" alt="Hornsby Shire Council" class="resources-image lozad"/>

<div class="resources-title">
<span>
Hornsby Shire Council »
</span>
</div>
<p class="resources-desc">
Hornsby Shire Council has local government responsibility for a region in the northern suburbs of Sydney, home to more than 150,000 people and covering approximately 510 square kilometres, including 6,000 hectares of public parks, waterways and bushland. The Council’s future vision is guided by four key themes – liveable, sustainable, productive and collaborative – and an initiative to embrace emerging technology and optimise existing digital assets.
</p>
</div>
</a>





<a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zgZrmWuZ51s" class="resources-card" data-video="youtube" data-video-id="zgZrmWuZ51s">
<div class="resources-card-body">

<img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/images/videos/video-fc-barcelona-fortinet-ciso-talks.png" alt="FC Barcelona &amp; Fortinet: Cybersecurity Takes Centre Stage" class="resources-image lozad"/>

<div class="resources-title">
<span>
FC Barcelona &amp; Fortinet: Cybersecurity Takes Centre Stage »
</span>
</div>
<p class="resources-desc">
Join Miriam Ferrando, CIO of FC Barcelona, and Alain Sanchez, EMEA Field CISO at Fortinet, for a deep-dive into how world-class digital transformation is secured at one of the most iconic football clubs on the planet.
</p>
</div>
</a>





<a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=g26XC6uMoKw" class="resources-card" data-video="youtube" data-video-id="g26XC6uMoKw">
<div class="resources-card-body">

<img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/images/videos/video-securing-education-sastra-university-fortinet.png" alt="Securing Education: SASTRA University &amp; Fortinet" class="resources-image lozad"/>

<div class="resources-title">
<span>
Securing Education: SASTRA University &amp; Fortinet »
</span>
</div>
<p class="resources-desc">
Discover how SASTRA Deemed University in Thanjavur partnered with Fortinet to enhance its cybersecurity infrastructure and protect critical academic data. From campus-wide secure connectivity to centralized threat management, learn how Fortinet’s Security Fabric supports the digital transformation of one of India’s leading educational institutions.
</p>
</div>
</a>





<a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pycq-Xj7gHA" class="resources-card" data-video="youtube" data-video-id="pycq-Xj7gHA">
<div class="resources-card-body">

<img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/images/videos/video-thumb-how-major-financial-institution-strengthens-network-security.png" alt="How a Major Financial Institution Strengthens Network Security" class="resources-image lozad"/>

<div class="resources-title">
<span>
How a Major Financial Institution Strengthens Network Security »
</span>
</div>
<p class="resources-desc">
Technology is a competitive advantage for modern financial institutions. Learn more about how Deutsche Bank and Fortinet worked together to build a strong, proactive network security infrastructure.
</p>
</div>
</a>





<a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bGb2ugo-Gvs" class="resources-card" data-video="youtube" data-video-id="bGb2ugo-Gvs">
<div class="resources-card-body">

<img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/images/videos/video-appleton-area-school-district-reduces-security-incidents.png" alt="Appleton Area School District Drastically Reduces Security Incidents" class="resources-image lozad"/>

<div class="resources-title">
<span>
Appleton Area School District Drastically Reduces Security Incidents »
</span>
</div>
<p class="resources-desc">
Appleton Area School District (AASD) is the sixth-largest school district in Wisconsin, catering to over 16,000 students. Learn how the district implemented the FortiMail solution to protect students and 2,500 staff and reduced security incidents by approximately 95%. AASD also implemented FortiEDR to improve endpoint management on devices. With Fortinet, the district has been able to dramatically improve its security posture and increase visibility of potential threats
</p>
</div>
</a>





<a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fik6yx12kkE" class="resources-card" data-video="youtube" data-video-id="fik6yx12kkE">
<div class="resources-card-body">

<img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/images/videos/video-enhancing-hotel-network-security-with-secure-sdwan.png" alt="Enhancing Hotel Network Security with Fortinet Secure SD-WAN" class="resources-image lozad"/>

<div class="resources-title">
<span>
Enhancing Hotel Network Security with Fortinet Secure SD-WAN »
</span>
</div>
<p class="resources-desc">
Discover how Radisson Hotel Group, boasting a portfolio of over 2,200 hotels globally, strategically deployed Fortinet's integrated networking security solution. Leveraging Fortinet Secure SDWAN, Radisson seamlessly connects its worldwide hotels, ensuring scalable operations and network reliability to enhance guest satisfaction.
</p>
</div>
</a>





<a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zqravoLEgGk" class="resources-card" data-video="youtube" data-video-id="zqravoLEgGk">
<div class="resources-card-body">

<img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/images/videos/video-grupo-bimbo-enhances-global-operations.png" alt="Grupo Bimbo" class="resources-image lozad"/>

<div class="resources-title">
<span>
Grupo Bimbo »
</span>
</div>
<p class="resources-desc">
Grupo Bimbo a global baking company that operates in over 34 countries needed to accelerate its digital transformation and journey to the cloud. They needed to replace their existing private cloud network with a more secure and agile solution to increase performance at the edge and accommodate their diverse regional operation requirements. Hear how Grupo Bimbo met all their needs by deploying Fortinet Secure SDWAN to over 1,000 locations in a hub-and-spoke model. Since deploying Fortinet, Grupo Bimbo has a flexible, highly configurable, and unified platform for its Digital Transformation.
</p>
</div>
</a>













</div>
</div>


</div>
<div class="id-tab-container c968-resources-tab-container" data-tab data-tabId="c968_resources_tiles-11">

<div class="resources-list">
<div class="resources-row">


<a class="resources-card" target="_blank" href="https://global.fortinet.com/lp-en-wc-quantum">
<div class="resources-card-body">

<img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/images/webinars/on-demand-network-security.jpg" alt="The Quantum Shift: What It Means for Your Security Strategy" class="resources-image lozad"/>

<div class="resources-title">
<span>
The Quantum Shift: What It Means for Your Security Strategy »
</span>
</div>
<p class="resources-desc">
Join Fortinet experts for a clear, practical conversation on how quantum computing will change today’s cryptographic landscape, where your environment is most exposed, and what it takes to build a quantum-safe posture without adding operational complexity.
</p>
</div>
</a>





<a class="resources-card" target="_blank" href="https://global.fortinet.com/lp-en-wc-fabric-via-ai?utm_source=website&utm_medium=Fortinet-event&utm_campaign=SecureNetwork-NAMER-US&utm_content=WC-fabric-via-ai-G&utm_term=Website&lsci=701Hr000002MMhmIAG&UID=ftnt-9733-832996">
<div class="resources-card-body">

<img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/images/webinars/harness-ai-power-fmg.jpg" alt="Harness the Power of AI Using FortiAI within FortiManager " class="resources-image lozad"/>

<div class="resources-title">
<span>
Harness the Power of AI Using FortiAI within FortiManager »
</span>
</div>
<p class="resources-desc">
Revolutionize your network management and security operations by learning how GenAI powers FortiManager.
</p>
</div>
</a>



</div>
</div>


</div>
<div class="id-tab-container c968-resources-tab-container" data-tab data-tabId="c968_resources_tiles-12">

<div class="resources-list">
<div class="resources-row">


<a class="resources-card" target="_blank" href="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/white-papers/wp-custom-asics.pdf">
<div class="resources-card-body">

<img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/white-papers/wp-custom-asics.pdf.thumb.319.319.png" alt="The Benefits of Combining Custom ASICs with the Power of FortiOS" class="resources-image lozad"/>

<div class="resources-title">
<span>
The Benefits of Combining Custom ASICs with the Power of FortiOS »
</span>
</div>
<p class="resources-desc">
Fortinet’s platform improves security performance and contributes to sustainability efforts by optimizing power efficiency and reducing the carbon footprint of large-scale deployments.
</p>
</div>
</a>





<a class="resources-card" target="_blank" href="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/white-papers/wp-securing-ai-center.pdf">
<div class="resources-card-body">

<img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/white-papers/wp-securing-ai-center.pdf.thumb.319.319.png" alt="Securing the AI Data Center: Why CIOs and CISOs Must Prepare Now" class="resources-image lozad"/>

<div class="resources-title">
<span>
Securing the AI Data Center: Why CIOs and CISOs Must Prepare Now »
</span>
</div>
<p class="resources-desc">
Fortinet’s Secure AI Data Center solution delivers the visibility, performance, and protection required as AI transforms the enterprise data center.
</p>
</div>
</a>





<a class="resources-card" target="_blank" href="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/white-papers/wp-future-proofing-security.pdf">
<div class="resources-card-body">

<img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/white-papers/wp-future-proofing-security.pdf.thumb.319.319.png" alt="Future-Proofing Your Security: A Guide to Implementing Quantum-Safe Cryptography" class="resources-image lozad"/>

<div class="resources-title">
<span>
Future-Proofing Your Security: A Guide to Implementing Quantum-Safe Cryptography »
</span>
</div>
<p class="resources-desc">
This paper outlines the urgency of the quantum threat and presents two strategic approaches to mitigating it: Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) and Quantum Key Distribution (QKD).
</p>
</div>
</a>





<a class="resources-card" target="_blank" href="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/white-papers/wp-microsegmentation.pdf">
<div class="resources-card-body">

<img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/white-papers/wp-microsegmentation.pdf.thumb.319.319.png" alt="The Imperative of Microsegmentation" class="resources-image lozad"/>

<div class="resources-title">
<span>
The Imperative of Microsegmentation »
</span>
</div>
<p class="resources-desc">
By adopting microsegmentation within a centralized, policy-driven architecture, organizations can strengthen zero-trust initiatives, meet compliance mandates, and improve cybersecurity resilience across hybrid and multi-cloud environments.
</p>
</div>
</a>





<a class="resources-card" target="_blank" href="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/white-papers/wp-tomorrows-data-center.pdf">
<div class="resources-card-body">

<img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/white-papers/wp-tomorrows-data-center.pdf.thumb.319.319.png" alt="Building Tomorrow’s Data Center: Your Journey Starts Now" class="resources-image lozad"/>

<div class="resources-title">
<span>
Building Tomorrow’s Data Center: Your Journey Starts Now »
</span>
</div>
<p class="resources-desc">
The distributed nature of modern networks, coupled with the rising sophistication of cybercrime, demands a holistic, integrated, and proactive security strategy.
</p>
</div>
</a>





<a class="resources-card" target="_blank" href="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/white-papers/wp-criteria-for-choosing-ngfw.pdf">
<div class="resources-card-body">

<img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/white-papers/wp-criteria-for-choosing-ngfw.pdf.thumb.319.319.png" alt="Scaling for High-Performance Security" class="resources-image lozad"/>

<div class="resources-title">
<span>
Scaling for High-Performance Security »
</span>
</div>
<p class="resources-desc">
NGFWs should provide threat protection at every edge across the branch, campus, and the data center without sacrificing performance.
</p>
</div>
</a>





<a class="resources-card" target="_blank" href="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/white-papers/wp-ai-combat-cyberthreats.pdf">
<div class="resources-card-body">

<img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/white-papers/wp-ai-combat-cyberthreats.pdf.thumb.319.319.png" alt="Use Artificial Intelligence to Combat Cyberthreats" class="resources-image lozad"/>

<div class="resources-title">
<span>
Use Artificial Intelligence to Combat Cyberthreats »
</span>
</div>
<p class="resources-desc">
When it comes to a future full of bad actors using AI-based tactics, it’s critical for security and IT leaders and their teams to evolve their security strategies to address these sophisticated new AI-powered threats.
</p>
</div>
</a>





<a class="resources-card" target="_blank" href="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/white-papers/pov-digital-acceleration-requires-converged-security.pdf">
<div class="resources-card-body">

<img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/assets/white-papers/pov-digital-acceleration-requires-converged-security.pdf.thumb.319.319.png" alt="Digital Acceleration Requires Converged Security and Networking" class="resources-image lozad"/>

<div class="resources-title">
<span>
Digital Acceleration Requires Converged Security and Networking »
</span>
</div>
<p class="resources-desc">
For digital acceleration to succeed, networks must do more than they did in the past, which can increase risk
</p>
</div>
</a>









</div>
</div>


</div>

<div class="id-tab-container c968-resources-tab-container" data-tab data-tabId="c968_resources_tiles-13">
<div class="resources-list">

</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="C05-Container">



<section class="section--features cs--small--padding bg--fullwhite ">
<div class="wrap wrap--default ">




<div class="C969-Forticare-Services">


<div class="C15-Title">
<h2 class="new--design">
FortiCareサポート / プロフェッショナルサービス
</h2>
</div>
<p> フォーティネットはお客様の成功のために注力し、FortiCareサービスはフォーティネットの製品とサービスに対するお客様の投資を最大限活用できるよう、毎年、数千もの組織を支援しています。その実現に向け、FortiCareはライフサイクルアプローチを採用し、お客様の成功に向けた方針を支援する以下のような独自のサービスを提供しています。</p>
<div class="row stretch">
<!-- Get the locale of the page -->





<div class="col-3 col-md-6 col-sm-12 cta--item">
<div class="xfpage page basicpage">




<div class="xf-content-height">


<div class="aem-Grid aem-Grid--12 aem-Grid--default--12 ">
<div class="C863-Forticare-Services-List aem-GridColumn aem-GridColumn--default--12">


<div class="products-features-benefits">
<div class="products-features-benefits-icon">
<img class="lozad" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/images/icons/fc-services/icon-technical-support.svg" src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" alt="テクニカルサポートサービス"/>
</div>
<div class="products-features-benefits-desc">
<p><b>テクニカルサポートサービス</b></p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="products-features-benefits benefits">
<div class="products-features-benefits-desc">
<p>デバイスごとにさまざまなオプションが用意されており、効率的な運用が可能です。FortiCare Eliteオプションは、クリティカルな製品に対して15分の応答目標時間を提供しています。</p>
</div>
</div></div>

</div>

</div></div>


</div>



<div class="col-3 col-md-6 col-sm-12 cta--item">
<div class="xfpage page basicpage">




<div class="xf-content-height">


<div class="aem-Grid aem-Grid--12 aem-Grid--default--12 ">
<div class="C863-Forticare-Services-List aem-GridColumn aem-GridColumn--default--12">


<div class="products-features-benefits">
<div class="products-features-benefits-icon">
<img class="lozad" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/images/icons/fc-services/icon-advanced-support.svg" src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" alt="アドバンストサポート"/>
</div>
<div class="products-features-benefits-desc">
<p><b>アドバンストサポート</b></p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="products-features-benefits benefits">
<div class="products-features-benefits-desc">
<p>アカウントごとにさまざまなプレミアムサービスを利用でき、専任のエキスパートによる運用レビューにより、中断を軽減し、生産性を向上させます。</p>
</div>
</div></div>

</div>

</div></div>


</div>



<div class="col-3 col-md-6 col-sm-12 cta--item">
<div class="xfpage page basicpage">




<div class="xf-content-height">


<div class="aem-Grid aem-Grid--12 aem-Grid--default--12 ">
<div class="C863-Forticare-Services-List aem-GridColumn aem-GridColumn--default--12">


<div class="products-features-benefits">
<div class="products-features-benefits-icon">
<img class="lozad" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/images/icons/fc-services/icon-professional-services.svg" src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" alt="プロフェッショナルサービス"/>
</div>
<div class="products-features-benefits-desc">
<p><b>プロフェッショナルサービス</b></p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="products-features-benefits benefits">
<div class="products-features-benefits-desc">
<p>当社のマルチベンダーエキスパートは、ネットワークやセキュリティの目標を達成し、新しい機能を採用するのに役立つ、ベストプラクティスにもとづいた充実したソリューションを設計し、導入することができます。</p>
</div>
</div></div>

</div>

</div></div>


</div>



<div class="col-3 col-md-6 col-sm-12 cta--item">
<div class="xfpage page basicpage">




<div class="xf-content-height">


<div class="aem-Grid aem-Grid--12 aem-Grid--default--12 ">
<div class="C863-Forticare-Services-List aem-GridColumn aem-GridColumn--default--12">


<div class="products-features-benefits">
<div class="products-features-benefits-icon">
<img class="lozad" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/images/icons/fc-services/icon-premium-rma-services.svg" src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" alt="RMA"/>
</div>
<div class="products-features-benefits-desc">
<p><b>RMA</b></p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="products-features-benefits benefits">
<div class="products-features-benefits-desc">
<p>Priority RMAオプションは製品ファミリー全体で利用可能で、欠陥のあるハードウェアを迅速に交換し、可用性の目標を達成できます。</p>
</div>
</div></div>

</div>

</div></div>


</div>


</div>

<div class="cta-wrapper">
<a class="security-anchor" target="_self" href="/jp/support"><button class="security-button">詳細</button></a>
</div>




</div>




</div>
</section>
</div>


<div class="C966-Training-Certificate">
<style>
.training-container h2.new--design:after {
margin: 16px 0 30px;
}
.C966-Training-Certificate{
background: #F4F4F4;
}

.certification-list{
display: flex;
flex-direction: row;
justify-content: space-between;
padding-bottom: 14px;
padding-top: 15px;
}
.certification-list:not(:last-child){
border-bottom: 1px solid #D9D9D9;
}
.certification-list:last-child{
padding-bottom: 16px;
}
.certification-title a {
font-weight: 600;
font-size: 15px;
line-height: 22px;
color: #323E48;
}
.certification-title {
flex-basis: 20%;
}
.certification-desc{
font-weight: 400;
font-size: 14px;
line-height: 22px;
color: #323E48;
flex-basis: 65%;
}
.certification-more{
flex-basis: 7%;
}
.certification-more a{
font-weight: 600;
font-size: 14px;
text-align: right;
color: #323E48;
}
.training-caret{
display: inline-block;
width: 0;
height: 0;
vertical-align: middle;
border-top: 6px solid #171616;
border-right: 6px solid transparent;
border-left: 6px solid transparent;
position: absolute;
top: 28px;
right: 10px;
transform: rotate(-90deg);
transition: all .5s ease-in-out;
}
.training-desc {
text-overflow: ellipsis;
-webkit-line-clamp: 2;
-webkit-box-orient: vertical;
-moz-box-orient: vertical;
overflow: hidden;
margin: 0px;
font-weight: 400;
font-size: 15px;
line-height: 22px;
color: #333333;
flex-direction: column;
display: flex;
height:0px;
transition: all .5s ease-in-out;
}

.transform{
transform: rotate(0deg)!important;
}
.training-title{
line-height: 30px;
color: #236093;
margin-top: 19px;
margin-bottom: 19px;
font-weight: 700;
font-size: 20px;
line-height: 22px;
color: #323E48;
overflow: hidden;
}
.training-list{
width:100%;
}

.training-container {
margin: 0px auto;
padding:50px 0px;
}
.training-row {
display:flex;
flex-direction:column !important;
justify-content:flex-start;
flex-flow: nowrap;
overflow-x: hidden;
}
.training-card {
margin:8px 0px 0px;
background: #FFFFFF;
flex: 0 0 100%;
position: relative;
border: 1px solid #B4B4B4;
border-radius: 4px;
}
.training-card:hover {
cursor: pointer;
}
.training-card-body {
padding:0px 32px;
}
.training-container .security-subheader{
margin-bottom: 32px;
}
@media screen and (max-width:1240px) {
.training-card {
width:100%;
}
}

@media screen and (max-width:825px) {
.training-container {
width:100%;
}
.training-card {
flex: 0 0 100%;
margin:4px auto;
}
.training-container .security-subheader{
margin-bottom: 20px;
}
.certification-list{
padding:24px 0px;
}
.certification-list:first-child{
padding-top: 0px;
}

}
@media (max-width: 500px) {
.training-container.container {
padding-left: 0px;
padding-right: 0px;
}
.training-container {
flex-direction: column;
}
.certification-list{
flex-direction: column;
}
.training-list{
width:100%;
}
.certification-desc{
padding: 10px 0px;
}
.certification-list:first-child{
padding-top: 5px;
}
}
</style>
<div class="bg--gray2">
<div class="wrap wrap--default">
<div class="training-container container">
<div class="C15-Title">
<h2 class="new--design">トレーニング / 認定</h2>
<div class="security-subheader reviews">
</div>
</div>
<div class="training-list">
<div class="training-row">
<div class="training-card">
<div class="training-card-body">

<div class="training-title">フォーティネット認定プロフェッショナル - ネットワークセキュリティ</div>

<div class="training-desc">


<div class="certification-list">
<div class="certification-title">
<a target="_blank" href="https://training.fortinet.com/local/staticpage/view.php?page=library_fortigate-administrator">FortiGate Administrator</a>
</div>
<div class="certification-desc">
In this course, candidates will learn how to protect their networks using the most common FortiGate features.
</div>
<div class="certification-more">
<a target="_blank" href="https://training.fortinet.com/local/staticpage/view.php?page=library_fortigate-administrator">詳細を確認する</a>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<span class="training-caret"></span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="training-card">
<div class="training-card-body">

<div class="training-title">フォーティネット認定ソリューションスペシャリスト - ネットワークセキュリティ</div>

<div class="training-desc">


<div class="certification-list">
<div class="certification-title">
<a target="_blank" href="https://training.fortinet.com/local/staticpage/view.php?page=library_enterprise-firewall">Enterprise Firewall</a>
</div>
<div class="certification-desc">
In this course, you will learn how to implement, troubleshoot, and centrally manage an enterprise security infrastructure composed of multiple FortiGate devices.
</div>
<div class="certification-more">
<a target="_blank" href="https://training.fortinet.com/local/staticpage/view.php?page=library_enterprise-firewall">詳細を確認する</a>
</div>
</div>


<div class="certification-list">
<div class="certification-title">
<a target="_blank" href="https://training.fortinet.com/local/staticpage/view.php?page=library_sd-wan">SD-WAN</a>
</div>
<div class="certification-desc">
Learn about common SD-WAN deployment scenarios using Fortinet Secure SD-WAN solutions. You will explore different situations, from a single enterprise site, to multiple data center environments, that will help you to enhance and troubleshoot SD-WAN deployments.
</div>
<div class="certification-more">
<a target="_blank" href="https://training.fortinet.com/local/staticpage/view.php?page=library_sd-wan">詳細を確認する</a>
</div>
</div>


<div class="certification-list">
<div class="certification-title">
<a target="_blank" href="https://training.fortinet.com/local/staticpage/view.php?page=library_lan-edge">LAN Edge</a>
</div>
<div class="certification-desc">
In this three-day course, you will learn how FortiGate, FortiAP, FortiSwitch, and FortiAuthenticator enable secure connectivity over wired and wireless networks. You will also learn how to provision, administer, and monitor FortiAP and FortiSwitch devices using FortiManager. 
</div>
<div class="certification-more">
<a target="_blank" href="https://training.fortinet.com/local/staticpage/view.php?page=library_lan-edge">詳細を確認する</a>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<span class="training-caret"></span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="training-card">
<div class="training-card-body">

<div class="training-title">フォーティネット認定ソリューションスペシャリスト - OTセキュリティ</div>

<div class="training-desc">


<div class="certification-list">
<div class="certification-title">
<a target="_blank" href="https://training.fortinet.com/local/staticpage/view.php?page=library_ot-security">OT Security</a>
</div>
<div class="certification-desc">
Learn how to design, deploy, administrate, and monitor FortiGate, FortiNAC, FortiAnalyzer, and FortiSIEM devices to secure OT infrastructures. These skills will provide you with a solid understanding of how to design, implement, and operate an OT security solution based on Fortinet products.
</div>
<div class="certification-more">
<a target="_blank" href="https://training.fortinet.com/local/staticpage/view.php?page=library_ot-security">詳細を確認する</a>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<span class="training-caret"></span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="training-card">
<div class="training-card-body">

<div class="training-title">その他のトレーニング</div>

<div class="training-desc">


<div class="certification-list">
<div class="certification-title">
<a target="_blank" href="https://training.fortinet.com/local/staticpage/view.php?page=library_fortigate-essentials">FortiGate Essentials</a>
</div>
<div class="certification-desc">
In this interactive course, you will learn how to operate and administrate some fundamental FortiGate features
</div>
<div class="certification-more">
<a target="_blank" href="https://training.fortinet.com/local/staticpage/view.php?page=library_fortigate-essentials">詳細を確認する</a>
</div>
</div>


<div class="certification-list">
<div class="certification-title">
<a target="_blank" href="https://training.fortinet.com/local/staticpage/view.php?page=library_fortigate-7000-series">FortiGate 7000 Series</a>
</div>
<div class="certification-desc">
In this advanced, hands-on, 2-day class, you will learn about the key features of session-aware load balance cluster (SLBC) and the FortiGate 7000 chassis-based firewall series.
</div>
<div class="certification-more">
<a target="_blank" href="https://training.fortinet.com/local/staticpage/view.php?page=library_fortigate-7000-series">詳細を確認する</a>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<span class="training-caret"></span>
</div>
</div>

</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<script>
var trainingCard = document.querySelectorAll(".training-card");
var trainingDesc = document.querySelectorAll(".training-desc");

for (var i = 0; i < trainingCard.length; i++) {
trainingCard[i].addEventListener('click', function() {
slideDown(this.querySelector('.training-desc'));
this.querySelector('.training-caret').classList.toggle('transform');
});
}
const slideDown = element => element.style.height = (element.style.height=='0px')||(element.style.height=='')?element.scrollHeight+'px':'0px';
window.addEventListener('resize', function() {
trainingDesc.forEach(function(elem){
elem.style.height = '0px';
elem.nextElementSibling.classList.remove('transform');
})

}
);
</script></div>




</div>


<div class="free-demo">
<a id="free-demo" href="#" aria-label="無料のデモ"></a>





<div class="C05-Container">



<section class="section--products cs--small--padding bg--fullwhite ">
<div class="wrap wrap--default ">




<div class="C900-Layout">
<div class=" ">
<div class="row stretch ">
<div class="col-6 col-md-12 cta--item">




<div class="C15-Title">

<style>
.c15-img-style{
float: left;
padding-right: 20px;
width: 60px;
position: relative;
top: -5px;
}
.c15-img-title-style{
display: flex;
align-items: center;
margin-bottom: 20px;
}
.C15-Title .title-eyebrow
{
font-size: 12px;
font-weight: 700;
text-transform: uppercase;
color: #646464;
margin-top: 50px;
letter-spacing: .1rem;
}
.C15-Title .title-eyebrow + h2
{
margin-top: 25px !important;
}
</style>



<h2 class=" new--design ">

無料の製品デモ



</h2>






</div>


<div class="C32-Text text parbase">
<p>FortiGate次世代ファイアウォール（NGFW）のセルフガイド型デモで、セキュリティとネットワーキングのコンバージェンスの利点をご覧ください。</p>
<p><b>デモの内容</b>：</p>
<ul>
<li>FortiGate NGFWのAIを活用したセキュリティの詳細</li>
<li>セキュリティポリシーとネットワークポリシー構成の詳細<b></b></li>
<li>FortiOSで取得できるセキュリティステータスとイベントに関するインサイトについてご覧ください。</li>
</ul>


</div>


<div class="C900-Layout">
<div class=" ">
<div class="row stretch ">
<div class="col-12 col-md-12 cta--item">




<div class="C908-ImageLink">
<div class="image parbase img-thumbnail" alt="FortiGateダッシュボード">
<img class="lozad " src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII=" data-src="/content/dam/fortinet/images/products/demos/demo-ngfw-1.jpg" alt="FortiGateダッシュボード"/>
</div></div>



</div>

</div>
</div></div>



</div>
<div class="col-6 col-md-12 cta--item">




<div class="C900-Layout">
<div class=" updated-contactus">
<div class="row stretch ">
<div class="col-12 col-md-12 cta--item">




<div class="C51-Eloqua-Form">
<div>
<form id="comp-51" class="eloquaGated contact--form" data-thank-you="/content/fortinet-com/ja_jp/thank-you/demo.html" data-delay-notice="Note: Adblockers may prevent form submissions. Try disabling it if you are experiencing issues." hidden>
<div id="lpFormContainer" class="row">




<div class="text"><div class="form_row">
<div class="form_leftcol"><div class="form_leftcollabel"><label for="new_form_firstName">名 (First Name)</label></div><div class="form_leftcolmark"> *</div></div>

<div class="form_rightcol" id="firstName_rightcol"><div id="firstName_0_wrapper" class="form_rightcol_wrapper">
<input class="form_field form_field_text" id="new_form_firstName" name="firstName" value="" size="35" onkeydown=""

title="This field is required."

></div></div></div><div class="form_row_description"></div>

</div>


<div class="text"><div class="form_row">
<div class="form_leftcol"><div class="form_leftcollabel"><label for="new_form_lastName">姓 (Last Name)</label></div><div class="form_leftcolmark"> *</div></div>

<div class="form_rightcol" id="lastName_rightcol"><div id="lastName_0_wrapper" class="form_rightcol_wrapper">
<input class="form_field form_field_text" id="new_form_lastName" name="lastName" value="" size="35" onkeydown=""

title="This field is required."

></div></div></div><div class="form_row_description"></div>

</div>


<div class="dropdown">
<div class="form_row">
<div class="form_leftcol"><div class="form_leftcollabel"><label for="new_form_jobFunction">部門 (Job Function)</label></div><div class="form_leftcolmark"> *</div></div>

<div class="form_rightcol">
<select class="form_field form_field_select" id="new_form_jobFunction" name="jobFunction"

title="This field is required"

>
<option disabled selected value="">部門 (Job Function)</option>
<option value="Analyst">アナリスト</option><option value="Business Operations">経営企画</option><option value="Cloud Architect">Cloud Architect</option><option value="Cloud Infrastructure Manager">Cloud Infrastructure Manager</option><option value="Cloud Partner Manager">Cloud Partner Manager</option><option value="Cloud Security Manager">Cloud Security Manager</option><option value="Cloud Solutions Specialist">Cloud Solutions Specialist</option><option value="Finance/Procurement">経理/購買</option><option value="IT Applications">IT アプリケーション</option><option value="IT Architecture">IT アーキテクチャー</option><option value="IT Datacenter">IT データセンター</option><option value="IT Management">IT 管理</option><option value="IT Network">IT ネットワーク</option><option value="IT - Other">IT その他</option><option value="IT Partner/Reseller">パートナー/代理店</option><option value="IT Security">IT セキュリティー</option><option value="IT System">ITシステム</option><option value="Journalist">報道関係</option><option value="Marketing/Sales/Business Development">営業/マーケティング</option><option value="Student/Researcher">研究者/学生</option><option value="IT Consulting">IT コンサルティング</option><option value="Non IT - Other">その他</option><option value="OT ICS/SCADA"></option></select>
</div>
</div>
<div class="form_row_description"></div>


</div>


<div class="dropdown">
<div class="form_row">
<div class="form_leftcol"><div class="form_leftcollabel"><label for="new_form_jobLevel">役職 (Job Level)</label></div><div class="form_leftcolmark"> *</div></div>

<div class="form_rightcol">
<select class="form_field form_field_select" id="new_form_jobLevel" name="jobLevel"

title="This field is required"

>
<option disabled selected value="">役職 (Job Level)</option>
<option value="C-Level">役員</option><option value="Director">部長</option><option value="Manager">課長</option><option value="Engineer/Architect">エンジニア/アーキテクト</option><option value="Admin/Analyst">システム管理者/アナリスト</option><option value="Individual Contributor">一般社員</option><option value="Self-employed">個人事業主</option><option value="VP">本部長</option><option value="Other">その他</option></select>
</div>
</div>
<div class="form_row_description"></div>


</div>


<div class="text"><div class="form_row">
<div class="form_leftcol"><div class="form_leftcollabel"><label for="new_form_company">会社名</label></div><div class="form_leftcolmark"> *</div></div>

<div class="form_rightcol" id="company_rightcol"><div id="company_0_wrapper" class="form_rightcol_wrapper">
<input class="form_field form_field_text" id="new_form_company" name="company" value="" size="35" onkeydown=""

title="This field is required."

></div></div></div><div class="form_row_description"></div>

</div>


<div class="text"><div class="form_row">
<div class="form_leftcol"><div class="form_leftcollabel"><label for="new_form_emailAddress">メール アドレス (Email Address)</label></div><div class="form_leftcolmark"> *</div></div>

<div class="form_rightcol" id="emailAddress_rightcol"><div id="emailAddress_0_wrapper" class="form_rightcol_wrapper">
<input class="form_field form_field_text form_field_email" id="new_form_emailAddress" name="emailAddress" value="" size="35" onkeydown=""

title="This field is required."
constraintmsg="Must be an email address format. "

></div></div></div><div class="form_row_description"></div>

</div>


<div class="text"><div class="form_row">
<div class="form_leftcol"><div class="form_leftcollabel"><label for="new_form_BusPhone">電話番号</label></div><div class="form_leftcolmark"> *</div></div>

<div class="form_rightcol" id="BusPhone_rightcol"><div id="BusPhone_0_wrapper" class="form_rightcol_wrapper">
<input class="form_field form_field_text" id="new_form_BusPhone" name="BusPhone" value="" size="35" onkeydown=""

title="This field is required."

></div></div></div><div class="form_row_description"></div>

</div>


<div class="dropdown">
<div class="form_row">
<div class="form_leftcol"><div class="form_leftcollabel"><label for="new_form_country">国/地域</label></div><div class="form_leftcolmark"> *</div></div>

<div class="form_rightcol">
<select class="form_field form_field_select" id="new_form_country" name="country"

title="This field is required"

>
<option disabled selected value="">国/地域</option>
<option value="United States">米国</option><option value="United Kingdom">英国</option><option value="Canada">カナダ</option><option value="Australia">オーストラリア</option><option <div class="C991-CSS-JS">

<!-- JP form template -->

<style>
#lpFormContainer .C32-Text
{
width: 100%;
}
</style>

<script>
window.addEventListener('load', (event) => {
$(document).ready(function(){
$('form[action="/content/fortinet-com/ja_jp/promos/product-demo-form.html"]').addClass('product-demo-form');

//initiate the demo info
var demos = {};
demos['fortianalyzer-cloud-demo'] = {HFcampaignID: '701Hr000002S0eBIAS', productInterest: 'FortiAnalyzerCloud'};
demos['fortimanager-cloud-demo'] = {HFcampaignID: '701Hr000002RvcEIAS', productInterest: 'FortiManager-Cloud'};
demos['products/fortidlp/'] = {HFcampaignID: '701Hr000002RsBQIA0', HFemailID: '8515', productInterest: 'FortiDLP'};
demos['products/fortidlp'] = {HFcampaignID: '701Hr000002RsBQIA0', HFemailID: '8515', productInterest: 'FortiDLP'};
demos['fortidlp-demo'] = {HFcampaignID: '701Hr000002RsBQIA0', HFemailID: '8515', productInterest: 'FortiDLP'};
demos['fortiappsec-demo'] = {HFcampaignID: '701Hr000002RmUvIAK', HFemailID: '8515', productInterest: 'FortiAppSec'};
demos['fortipam-demo'] = {HFcampaignID: '701Hr000002Rm4nIAC', HFemailID: '8515', productInterest: 'FortiPAM'};
demos['products/fortipam'] = {HFcampaignID: '701Hr000002Rm4nIAC', HFemailID: '8515', productInterest: 'FortiPAM'};
demos['forticnapp-demo'] = {HFcampaignID: '701Hr000002MO7PIAW', HFemailID: '8515', productInterest: 'FortiCNAPP'};
demos['products/forticnapp'] = {HFcampaignID: '701Hr000002MO7PIAW', HFemailID: '8515', productInterest: 'FortiCNAPP'};
demos['products/forticnapp/'] = {HFcampaignID: '701Hr000002MO7PIAW', HFemailID: '8515', productInterest: 'FortiCNAPP'};
demos['solutions/cloud-security/'] = {HFcampaignID: '701Hr000002MO7PIAW', HFemailID: '8515', productInterest: 'FortiCNAPP'};
demos['solutions/small-business/firewall'] = {HFcampaignID: '70180000000Eoi4AAC', HFemailID: '8515', productInterest: 'FortiGate-Firewall'};
demos['fortigate-demo'] = {HFcampaignID: '70180000000Eoi4AAC', HFemailID: '8515', productInterest: 'FortiGate-Firewall'};
demos['products/next-generation-firewall'] = {HFcampaignID: '70180000000Eoi4AAC', HFemailID: '8515', productInterest: 'FortiGate-Firewall'};
demos['products/smallbusiness/virtual-firewall'] = {HFcampaignID: '701800000019GePAAU', HFemailID: '8515', productInterest: 'FortiGate-VM'};
demos['fortigate-vm-demo'] = {HFcampaignID: '701800000019GePAAU', HFemailID: '8515', productInterest: 'FortiGate-VM'};
demos['products/private-cloud-security'] = {HFcampaignID: '701800000019GePAAU', HFemailID: '8515', productInterest: 'FortiGate-VM'};

//get url
var current_url = window.location.href;
var valid_page = 0;
for (var demo_index in demos)
{
if(current_url.indexOf(demo_index) != -1)
{
valid_page = 1;
var hfcampaignid = demos[demo_index]['HFcampaignID'];
var hfemailid = demos[demo_index]['HFemailID'];
var productInterestId = demos[demo_index]['productInterest'];
$('input[name="HFcampaignID"]').attr('value',hfcampaignid);
$('input[name="HFemailID"]').attr('value',hfemailid);
$('input[name="productInterest"]').attr('value',productInterestId);
break;
}
}
if(valid_page == 0 && current_url.indexOf('product-demo-form') == -1)
{
$('.product-demo-form').css('display','none');
}



});
});
</script>

<script>document.onload = callhandleDocument();

function callhandleDocument(){
var Elqform=document.querySelector(".eloquaGated");
// Elqform.elements.namedItem("elqSiteId").value="69285"; // FOR STAGING INSTANCE ONLY

var formId= Elqform.elements.namedItem("elqSiteId").value;

handleDocumentLoad('eloquaGated',formId);

}

function handleDocumentLoad(b,a){
window.getElqFormSubmissionToken(b,a);
window.processLastFormField()}
function getElqFormSubmissionToken(g,c){
var e=new XMLHttpRequest();
var b=document.querySelector(".eloquaGated");
if(b&&b.elements.namedItem("elqFormSubmissionToken")){
var f=b.elements.namedItem("eloquaFormAction").value;
var a=window.getHostName(f);
a="https://"+a+"/e/formsubmittoken?elqSiteID="+c;
//alert(a);
if(a){
e.onreadystatechange=function(){
if(e.readyState===4){
if(e.status===200){
b.elements.namedItem("elqFormSubmissionToken").value=e.responseText}
else{
b.elements.namedItem("elqFormSubmissionToken").value=""}
}
};
e.open("GET",a,true);
e.send()}
else{
b.elements.namedItem("elqFormSubmissionToken").value=""}
}
}
function getHostName(b){
if(typeof window.URL==="function"){
return new window.URL(b).hostname}
else{
var a=b.match(/:\/\/(www[0-9]?\.)?(.[^\/:]+)/i);
if(a!==null&&a.length>2&&typeof a[2]==="string"&&a[2].length>0){
return a[2]}
else{
return null}
}
}
function processLastFormField(){
var form = document.querySelector(".eloquaGated");
var lastFormField = form.querySelector("#elq-FormLastRow");
lastFormField.style.display = "none";
}
</script>
</div>
